description: As a pharmacy informatics specialist, audit the Medication Routes definitions in the VistA database using the YDBGui web interface. Standardized medication routes are critical for interoperability and safe medication administration, and are stored in the MEDICATION ROUTES file #51.2, located in the ^PS(51.2) global. Navigate to the ^PS(51.2) global and display the entry for 'INTRAVENOUS' to verify its name and abbreviation. No login is required for the YDBGui Dashboard.
